title: Two Thembalethu brothers arrested for murder
description: GEORGE NEWS - Two brothers, aged 18 and 32...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Two brothers, aged 18 and 32 respectively, appeared in court last week on a charge of murder.

According to Sgt. Chris Spies, Southern Cape police spokesperson, the brothers are linked to the murder of Luzuko Rixhana (25), whose body was discovered on Wednesday, 4 June, in Silvertown, Zone 6.


> "The deceased’s body was found at the back of a wooden house with a stab wound to the chest.


"A member of the public came across the body and informed the police," said Spies. Their next court appearance is on 12 June.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
